Alice Macdonald

Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North

As your MP, I will:

  • Be your strong voice in parliament
  • Be a full-time MP
  • Always listen to you
  • Champion our great county and fine city
  • Always be honest with you
get In Touch

About Alice

Alice is the Labour and Co-operative Member of Parliament for Norwich North. Alice grew up in West Norfolk and lives in Norwich North.

Immediately before her election to parliament, Alice was a charity leader running a global campaign against hunger. Alice has more than 15 years’ experience in international development having held previous roles at Save the Children and the not for profit Project Everyone leading campaigns to tackle poverty, inequality and climate change. She has also worked overseas including in South Africa and Rwanda.

Alice also has a track record of serving communities. She was a councillor for 5 years including Cabinet member for Equalities and Leisure and is currently a trustee of Dawn’s New Horizon a domestic abuse charity based in Norwich North.

Alice has already fought for change in Norwich North, including successfully campaigning to keep the NHS walk-in centre open. She is committed to being a visible, active and accessible MP and standing up for Norwich North.

During the campaign Alice set out 5 priorities that she will focus on. These are underpinned by action to tackle the biggest challenges we face – the cost of living and the climate crises:

  • Action to lower your bills through investment in clean energy.
  • Cutting NHS waiting lists and improving access to NHS doctors and dentists.
  • Good affordable homes with the right infrastructure and great public transport
  • Increased opportunity- securing new green jobs, backing local businesses and fighting for a great education for every child.
  • Cutting crime and anti-social behaviour with more police on our streets.

My Promise To You

Trust in politics is at an all-time low and I can understand why many people simply don’t feel politics works for them.

I will work my hardest to restore trust and show that politicians are not all the same.  That’s why I have been out and about speaking to so many people across Norwich North to hear your concerns. 

As your MP, I will:

  • Be your strong voice in parliament – speaking up on the issues that matter to you. 
  • Be a full-time MP – unlike many, I would never take a second job.
  • Always listen to you – I hold regular constituency surgeries as well as being visible and accessible.
  • Champion our great county and fine city –  I’m proud to be from Norfolk and will stand up for investment in our area.
  • And I’ll always be honest with you –  I won’t make promises I can’t keep. 

Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North

Facebook Twitter Instagram
